graphs.label: T1110 - Brute Force
graphs.filter: message contains 'Failed password' or resultType matches '^[1-9]' or error_code='10'

graphs.label: T1059 - Command and Scripting Interpreter
graphs.filter: message matches '(bash|python|perl|powershell|cmd\.exe).*-(c|e|enc)' or message contains 'reverse shell'

graphs.label: T1078 - Valid Accounts
graphs.filter: user_name='root' or user_name='Administrator' or user_name='admin' or user_name='SYSTEM' or user_name='SYS'

graphs.label: T1098 - Account Manipulation
graphs.filter: message contains 'useradd' or message contains 'usermod' or message contains 'Add member to role' or message contains 'GRANT'

graphs.label: T1548 - Privilege Escalation (sudo)
graphs.filter: message contains 'sudo' or message contains 'NOT in sudoers'

graphs.label: T1021 - Remote Services
graphs.filter: (dstport=22 or dstport=3389 or dstport=5985 or dstport=5986) and action='allow'

graphs.label: T1590.002 - DNS Reconnaissance
graphs.filter: message contains 'AXFR' or message contains 'zone transfer'

graphs.label: T1571 - Non-Standard Port C2
graphs.filter: dstport=4444 or dstport=1337 or dstport=31337 or dstport=8080

graphs.label: T1005 - Data from Local System (DB exfil)
graphs.filter: (serverHost='hanadb-ocsf' or serverHost='attack-target-05') and (message contains 'SELECT' or message contains 'BACKUP')

graphs.label: T1136 - Create Account
graphs.filter: message contains 'useradd' or message contains 'new user' or message contains 'CREATE USER'

graphs.label: Top Attacker IPs (Cross-Source)
graphs.filter: src_ip is not null and serverHost contains 'attack-target'
